recentArticles.title: University of Wisconsin Board of Regents votes to fire system President Jay Rothman - Wisconsin Examiner
recentArticles.snippet: # University of Wisconsin Board of Regents votes to fire system President Jay Rothman. The University of Wisconsin Board of Regents voted unanimously to fire UW President Jay Rothman on Tuesday, ending his tenure as the leader of UW system campuses. The University of Wisconsin Board of Regents voted unanimously to fire UW President Jay Rothman on Tuesday, ending his tenure as the leader of UW system campuses and launching the process of finding a new leader. In a statement, the Board of Regents said that Rothman had “worked hard to bring the best to the campuses, students, faculty and staff” and those efforts are appreciated, but “despite these accomplishments, based on the annual performance review and subsequent discussions, the Board has lost confidence in President Rothman’s ability to lead the UWs moving forward.”. WMC said Rothman has helped to enhance the UW’s reputation and “that reputation will be severely tarnished by the Board of Regents if it votes to remove Jay from his position without justification.”.
recentArticles.summary: University of Wisconsin Board of Regents votes to fire system President Jay Rothman - Wisconsin Examiner

recentArticles.title: Agriculture Security Is National Security’ — Florida Lt. Gov. Jay Collins Meets With Local Farmers - NorthEscambia.com
recentArticles.snippet: # NorthEscambia.com. * All Battery Of Escambia County Jail Inmate Leads To Arrest Of Two Corrections Officers. Jay Collins Meets With Local Farmers. * MILO, The Mobile ID And Licensing Office, Is In Walnut Hill And Century This Week. * Florida Gas Prices Decline 20 Cents, But Escambia County Trends Upward. Jay Collins Meets With Local Farmers. Jay Collins met with farmers from Escambia and Santa Rosa counties on Monday in Jay. “Having grown up on a family farm, touring Diamond Farm in Santa Rosa County today and spending time with those on the front lines of Florida agriculture was personal for me,” Collins said. Collins visited several farms in the Jay area to discuss the challenges that farmers are facing from the economy and climate. “Supporting our farmers isn’t optional; it’s essential to keeping Florida and America strong,” Collins said. **Photos for NorthEscambia.com, click to enlarge.**. recentArticles.title: 'Michael' Clip of Jaafar Jackson's 'Billie Jean' Performance Slammed by Fans: 'F--king Atrocious' - TheWrap
recentArticles.snippet: “Literally the least inspired cinematography I’ve ever seen,” one critic writes on X. A new clip from the highly anticipated Michael Jackson biopic, titled “Michael,” was released Wednesday and featured star Jaafar Jackson’s take on “Billie Jean.” And, after being viewed over 8 million times, the consensus for the sneak peek was resoundingly negative. In the clip, Jackson, the real-life nephew of the late King of Pop, can be seen wearing his uncle’s signature white glove and black bedazzled jacket while singing the 1983 hit, “Billie Jean.” The scene is a recreation of the late Jackson’s famed performance for “Motown 25: Yesterday, Today, Forever,” where he debuted his famous moonwalk move for the first time. “Literally the least inspired cinematography I’ve ever seen,” one critic wrote in response to the clip’s release. “Michael,” which is set to hit theaters on April 24, has faced its fair share of drama leading up to the release, including millions in reshoots, a scrapped final act, a delayed release and more.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導關於麥可傑克森傳記電影預告片評價負面，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: How Following Raye’s Vision Led to a Career High Debut With ‘This Music May Contain Hope’ - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: ### RAYE’s ‘THIS MUSIC MAY CONTAIN HOPE.’ Makes Top 10 Debut on 4 Billboard Album Charts. Since then, her trajectory has been on a big upswing: the success of *Blues* led to a Grammy nomination for best new artist in 2025, where she stole the show at the ceremony with a rendition of “Oscar Winning Tears,” and the subsequent release of her second album, *THIS MUSIC MAY CONTAIN HOPE*, and its breakout single “Where Is My Husband?” This week, *HOPE* debuted at No. 11 on the Billboard 200 and “Husband” reached No. 11 on the Hot 100, both career-high marks for Raye — feats which earn Human Re Sources founder/CEO **J Erving** the title of *Billboard*’s Executive of the Week. **This week, Raye’s new album *THIS MUSIC MAY CONTAIN HOPE* debuted in the top 10 on four different *Billboard* charts, and hit No. 11 on the Billboard 200, a career high for her.

recentArticles.title: YouTuber Jesser Launches Parent Company, Preps Business Expansion - ADWEEK
recentArticles.snippet: # YouTuber Jesser Launches Parent Company, Preps Business Expansion. ## The media company, which generates an eight-figure revenue, has content and product debuts coming later this year. On Friday, the YouTube creator Jesse “Jesser” Riedel announced the formation of JesserCo., a new parent company that will unite his growing portfolio of businesses under a single structure. The 27-year-old Jesser will remain founder, while Zach Miller, who previously served as president of Bucketsquad, Jesser’s apparel brand, has been elevated to president of JesserCo. The reorganization brings together two main operating businesses: Jesser Media, the newly named home for his content operation, and Bucketsquad, the basketball lifestyle and apparel brand. Jesser Media reaches more than 45 million subscribers and followers, primarily through his YouTube channel, and has generated more than 10 billion views across platforms, according to the company. Mark Stenberg is ADWEEK's senior media reporter. ## Media. #### EXCLUSIVE: Soccer Media Startup Footballco Wants to Own New York's World Cup Summer.
recentArticles.summary: 此資訊與周杰倫無關，主要報導YouTuber Jesser成立母公司JesserCo.並擴展其內容和服飾品牌業務。

recentArticles.title: A Belieber's Review of Justin Bieber's Coachella 2026 Set - Vogue Philippines
recentArticles.snippet: Two hours before Justin Bieber began his 2026 Coachella set last night, I found myself inching closer and closer towards the main stage, where the Canadian pop star and late millennial icon was set to perform at 11:25 p.m. Some diehard Beliebers—Justin’s fiercest fans—were already camped out near the front barricades. Bieber began totally alone on the stage with one of his new tracks, “All I Can Take.” In true J.B. fashion, he emerged wearing a large oversized pink hoodie from his own brand SKYLRK, and baggy shorts by Lu’u Dan. Then came other tracks from his *Swag* and *Swag II* albums: he sang “Speed Demon,” “Go Baby,” “Everything Hallelujah”—with the latter track, the camera panned to his wife Hailey Bieber in the crowd, as she watched on lovingly and sang along. Nearing the end of the show, Bieber shed his pink hoodie and shades to rock a simple black cutoff tee—returning to perform more stripped-down *Swag* tracks like “Yukon” and “Daisies.” More special guests emerged, including Tems, Wizkid, Dijon, the Kid LAROI, and Mk.gee.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於小賈斯汀（Justin Bieber）在2026年Coachella音樂節的演出，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Kehlani Teams Up With Missy Elliott For Aaliyah-Tributing ‘Back and Forth’ Single - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: It finds Kehlani in their signature lights-low R&B groove, with Elliott kicking thing off with some bold bars, boasting, “You know it’s some hot s–t/ Let me say what I’m gon’ say, let me stay on the topic/ Girl, woman, I do what I wanna do/ Why you trippin’ when I come right home to you?” over the song’s languorous beat before Kehlani steps in on the whispery first verse. The pre-chorus amps up the heat, with Kehlani singing, “And by-y-y-y-y/ By doing this later, I do us a favor / And by-y-y-y-y/ Don’t ruin my makeup, be there when you wake up,” before dipping into the singsongy chorus that pays homage to Elliott’s legendary late friend and collaborator Aaliyah’s 1994 debut hit single “Back & Forth.”. The new song comes after an epic run for Kehlani in 2025, which included the crossover anthem “Folded,” which landed the singer several chart milestones, with the track peaking at No. 6 on the Billboard Hot 100, marking her first top 10 on that singles chart.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊與周杰倫無關，主要報導Kehlani與Missy Elliott合作新歌並向Aaliyah致敬。

recentArticles.title: Bruno Mars’ The Romantic Tour Setlist: Every Song From Night 1 - billboard.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Bruno Mars’ The Romantic Tour Setlist: Every Song From Night 1. The first of his two shows in Las Vegas, Mars kicked off the two-hour maximalist soul, funk and pop jam session/. Arguably, Bruno Mars has held the keys to the Las Vegas Strip for more than a decade, thanks to two record-breaking residencies at The Cosmopolitan and Dolby Live, which have brought in more than $200 million. All this … and a parade with Hello Kitty made the debut of Mars’ The Romantic Tour an unforgettable occasion for the sold-out crowd that gathered to celebrate Mars both during the day and later that night at Allegiant Stadium. As for the main event, the first of his two shows in Las Vegas, Mars kicked off the two-hour maximalist soul, funk and pop jam session, around 8:50 p.m., and didn’t relinquish until he played every new track, old hit and crowd favorite — even bringing back Silk Sonic with Anderson .Paak. Visit Billboard Pro for music business news.

recentArticles.title: Bruno Mars Kicks off The Romantic Tour in Las Vegas & Receives Key to the Strip on ‘Bruno Mars Day’ - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Bruno Mars Kicks off The Romantic Tour in Las Vegas & Receives Key to the Strip on ‘Bruno Mars Day’. Vegas honored the pop supernova with a parade, while Bruno pledged a $1 million donation to the Intermountain Health Nevada Children's Hospital. Bruno Mars kicked off The Romantic Tour on Friday night (April 10) with a sold-out show in front of more than 60,000 fans packing Allegiant Stadium in Las Vegas. ### Bruno Mars' The Romantic Tour Setlist: Every Song From Night 1. Bruno started the day in style with a ride down the Strip in a vintage convertible for a parade honoring his contributions to the Las Vegas entertainment scene, as April 10 was renamed to Bruno Mars Day in Sin City. The Grammy-winning artist was given the key to the Las Vegas Strip, while Park Avenue outside Park MGM was renamed to Bruno Mars Drive. The Romantic Tour continues on Saturday night (April 11) when Bruno Mars returns to the Allegiant Stadium stage for another cinematic performance.

recentArticles.title: Jackson Wang’s MAGIC MAN 2 Is Where Happiness Prevails: Best Moments From His Brooklyn Show - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Jackson Wang’s MAGIC MAN 2 Is Where Happiness Prevails: Best Moments From His Brooklyn Show. Three years after lighting up the stage at Barclays Center for his first tour, Jackson Wang partied it up once more at the iconic Brooklyn, New York, venue on Friday (April 10). ### Jackson Wang Talks Inspiration for ‘MAGIC MAN 2’: ‘What Do I Want to Say as a Person?’. On social media, Magic Man concerts are essentially known for Wang’s viral and sexy interactions with his fans. For a string of three unreleased songs — “Shadows on the Wall,” “Contact” and “Closer” — Wang’s dancers brought four lucky fans on stage to sit down and enjoy the singer’s full attention on them. He revealed that the first song off the project is “Sex God.” The song featuring Pusha T and produced by Pharrell Williams debuted at the Louis Vuitton Fall Winter 2026 Show at Paris Fashion Week, but Wang confirmed that it would usher in a new era to shed away Magic Man.

recentArticles.title: BTS stays at No. 1 on the charts — and thwarts Ye in the process - WYSO Public Radio
recentArticles.snippet: Three albums debut in the top five of this week's *Billboard* albums chart. Last week, a No. 1 debut for BTS's *Arirang* seemed as inevitable as the tides: The K-pop boy band didn't have much competition beyond country star Luke Combs (whose *The Way I Am* debuted at No. 2), and the group had already banked six No. 1 albums in its career. This week, *Arirang*'s continued chart dominance seemed like less of a given, seeing as how a huge percentage of its first-week numbers came from album sales (which don't carry over from week to week), while the latest round of debuts figured to be similarly formidable. It needed those sales, too, because three albums debut just behind it in this week's top five, led by Ye — the rapper formerly known as Kanye West — and his long-delayed new release *Bully*, which debuts at No. 2. Aided by a new video that premiered on April 1 — and in line for *another* chart boost after Langley's album *Dandelion* drops this Friday — "Choosin' Texas" is this week's most-streamed song.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容主要關於BTS、Ye等藝人的專輯榜單表現，並未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Friday Dance Music Guide: The Week’s Best New Tracks From Afrojack, David Guetta & Sia & More - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Friday Dance Music Guide: The Week’s Best New Tracks From Afrojack, David Guetta & Sia & More. This week in dance music: Bonnie X Clyde, deadmau5 and Steve Appleton, Illenium, David Guetta, Dustin Lynch and Dead Turnley all made moves on the dance charts, as did Slayyyter, who clocked her first No. 1 on Top Dance Albums with her recently released *Wor$t Girl In America*. Bass favorite Virtual Riot releases 12-track *Burning Out*, his third studio album, written about a journey through burnout, collapse, sobriety and everything contained therein, with inspiration coming from this transformation and from music well outside the bass realm. “So I’ve always been a fan of Charli xcx’s album ‘how I’m feeling right now,’ not just because of the music, but because I like the idea of an album being the musical representation of how the artist is feeling when they wrote it,” Virtual Riot says in a statement.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要介紹本週最新的舞曲音樂，內容未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: With North America and Europe Tour Dates to Come, Keli Holiday Has ‘Hunkered Down’ With His Next Album - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # With North America and Europe Tour Dates to Come, Keli Holiday Has ‘Hunkered Down’ With His Next Album. Holiday had the honors of opening the ARIAs with a performance of his viral smash “Dancing2.” Just Holiday, his hair teased like a mane, chest out, staring down the barrel of national TV cameras. He’s a first-time nominee for the APRA Music Awards, including the coveted song of the year for “Dancing2,” which took flight on TikTok, where fans clamored to its message of love, connection and positivity. This new chapter for Keli Holiday is a “representative of love,” he tells *Billboard* over Zoom. He’s the alter-ego of Adam Hyde, who alongside Reuben Styles is co-founder of Peking Duk, the multi-platinum, ARIA Award-winning electronic duo which has accumulated more than 400 million streams across such songs as “High,” “Take Me Over,” “Stranger” and “Fire.” The duo’s debut album, *Paradise*, is due out Aug. 14 and features the cut “Thrills” with Rico Nasty.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊主要關於音樂人Keli Holiday的專輯與巡演計畫，與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Tyga to Make Feature Film Debut in Coming-of-Age Drama Alongside ‘Outer Banks’ Star Madison Bailey - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Tyga to Make Feature Film Debut in Coming-of-Age Drama Alongside ‘Outer Banks’ Star Madison Bailey. In addition to starring in a lead role, the rapper is also cowriting and producing the film, titled *Baby, You're a Star*. Tyga will star alongside *Outer Banks*‘ Madison Bailey, Ashton Sanders, Mike Epps, Apollonia, Clifton Powell, Patrick Cage and David Alan Grier. The film’s storyline hits home with Tyga, which will follow an aspiring music artst determined to overcome life’s obstacles to reach stardom. “Blending music, nostalgia and raw emotional stakes, the film aims to capture the spirit of a generation on the brink of cultural change,” a press release for *Baby, You’re a Star* states. Production for the movie is currently underway in Portland, Ore. Tyga has been a rap staple for nearly 15 years since his breakout Billboard Hot 100 top 10 hit “Rack City,” which reached No. 7 on the chart in early 2012. Visit Billboard Pro for music business news.

recentArticles.title: Ziggy Marley Shares Why He Decided to Release His New Album Exclusively on Vinyl & CDs - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Ziggy Marley Shares Why He Decided to Release His New Album Exclusively on Vinyl & CDs. In a new episode of *Billboard*'s *Takes Us Out*, Marley talks about his creative process, *Yo Gabba GabbaLand!* cameo and his love of sports over a vegan meal. Over their meal, the duo talk about Marley’s upcoming album, collecting vinyl and being vulnerable in music. “I’m only vegan part-time,” Marley jokes. Marley is releasing his new album, *Brightside*, in an unconventional way. He attributes his decision to release his album this way to seeing how music was made when he was growing up, especially with his father, the late legend Bob Marley. “I grew up around seeing records being manufactured, vinyl from the conception to the final product,” Marley explains. “The most important vinyl is the first vinyl I bought,” Marley says before naming an album that was surely many collectors’ first: *Thriller*. “[I was] also getting some sparks of creativity, you know, being on a movie set,” Marley says.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於Ziggy Marley決定以黑膠和CD形式獨家發行新專輯《Brightside》的原因，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Justin Trudeau's Son, 18, Says His Dad's Girlfriend Katy Perry Gives Him Music Advice as He Gets Candid About Their Relationship - Yahoo News Canada
recentArticles.snippet: # Justin Trudeau's Son, 18, Says His Dad's Girlfriend Katy Perry Gives Him Music Advice as He Gets Candid About Their Relationship. * Xav Trudeau shares that his dad Justin Trudeau's girlfriend Katy Perry gives him feedback on his music and advice on improving his songs. * Xav describes Perry as "super nice" and says his dad's happiness in the relationship is what matters most. * Perry and Justin Trudeau were first linked in the summer and made their public debut as a couple in October. When Justin Trudeau's son Xav is looking for advice on his music, he's able to go to his dad's girlfriend, singer Katy Perry. "When I'm really happy with a song [I] send it [to her]," Xav, 18, said of Perry, 41, while appearing on an episode of the *Can't Be Censored*podcast. This past December, a source told PEOPLE that while Perry wasn't looking for a boyfriend, the relationship was an "exciting surprise.".
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞主要報導加拿大總理Justin Trudeau之子Xav從其父親的女友Katy Perry獲得音樂建議，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Sommelier Fabien Jacob on When the Wine List Really Works - FSR magazine
recentArticles.snippet: Mon Chou Chou’s wine program is built for the room and clientele it actually has—a French brasserie in a busy district, serving a broad mix of guests in a high-volume environment. Mon Chou Chou’s wine program is built for the room and clientele it actually has—a French brasserie in a busy district, serving a broad mix of guests in a high-volume environment. The dining room, Jacob says, is built for guests who range from confident wine drinkers to people who would rather not pronounce a French appellation out loud. “I would prioritize a wine list that is easily digestible for the customer,” Jacob says. At Mon Chou Chou, the NA program includes nonalcoholic beer, wine, and cocktails, and Jacob says the team approached product selection the same way they approach the rest of the list: by tasting broadly and choosing what fits the market, not his personal preference.
recentArticles.summary: Sommelier Fabien Jacob on When the Wine List Really Works - FSR magazine

recentArticles.title: ‘Saturday Night Live UK’ Season 1: All the Hosts and Musical Guests - The Hollywood Reporter
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘Saturday Night Live UK’ Season 1: All the Hosts and Musical Guests. British comedian Jack Whitehall will be joined by singer Jorja Smith for this Saturday's live show. The show kicked off on March 21 with inaugural host and *SNL* hall-of-famer Tina Fey, who shepherded the relatively unknown cast of British social media stars and stand-up comedians to a solid start. ### Scott Mills' 'Celebrity Great British Bake Off' Episode Scrapped After His BBC Sacking](https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/tv/tv-news/scott-mills-celebrity-great-british-bake-off-episode-axed-1236558615/). recentArticles.title: Justin Bieber is headlining Coachella this month: How the pop star is forging a new path - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: ## After health struggles, a canceled tour and selling his catalog, Bieber is signaling a comeback with new music and intimate performances ahead of the festival. Before this month’s music festival, Bieber stepped out for a series of intimate, invite-only performances in Los Angeles. While it’s unclear whether Bieber’s Los Angeles shows offer a preview of his entire Coachella setlist, it’s worth noting that because Bieber sold the rights to his back catalog of music to all songs he released through 2021, he will not receive performance royalties for older tracks. Bieber’s small shows in Los Angeles weren’t his only performance ahead of Coachella: He also took the Grammys stage in February, where he stripped down to just shorts and socks to sing his *Swag* track “Yukon.” His wife, Hailey Bieber, was emotional in the audience as Bieber showed off a back tattoo that was supposedly a portrait of the Rhode Beauty founder.
recentArticles.summary: Justin Bieber is headlining Coachella this month: How the pop star is forging a new path - Yahoo

recentArticles.title: Jack White announces summer tour, two NYC shows. Get tickets today - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: Jack White — *who served as the musical guest on “Saturday Night Live” alongside the “School of Rock” host on April 4* — just announced he’s added a North American leg to his 2026 world tour. Ahead of the tour announcement, the virtuosic axeman was revealed as a surprise special guest for Coachella this weekend, swung into “The Late Show with Stephen Colbert” *and* dropped a pair of fiery singles titled “Derecho Demonico” and “G.O.D. And The Broken Ribs,” which he delivered with gusto on the recent Jack Black/Jack White episode. At his Brooklyn Paramount gig on Feb. 12, he rocked 21 tracks including White Stripes fan favorites “Seven Nation Army,” “Icky Thump” and “Hotel Yorba” as well as Raconteurs tunes, Dead Weather deep cuts, ditties from his solo career and stunning Iggy Pop and Booker T. Inventory to see Jack White live is available on all verified ticketing sites. ## Jack White tour schedule 2026. | Jack White 2026 festival dates |. ## Jack White new music.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇新聞報導了Jack White即將舉行的巡迴演唱會、新音樂發行以及過去的演出，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: Grammy winner Zach Top added to CMAC 2026 lineup - Democrat and Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: First-time Grammy Award-winning country music artist Zach Top joins the lineup of upcoming 2026 summer concerts at the Constellation Brands-Marvin Sands Performing Arts Center. Top, known for hits like "I Never Lie" and "Sounds Like The Radio," will take the CMAC stage at 8 p.m. Aug. 8 for his "Cold Beer & Country Music Summer '26 Tour." The show's special guest will be Wyatt McCubbin. Tickets for the "Cold Beer & Country Music Summer '26 Tour" will go on sale at 10 a.m. April 17 through Ticketmaster.com. * Jack Johnson will perform July 1. * Rochester Philharmonic Orchestra will perform its "Red White & Boom" concert on July 2. * Dierks Bentley will perform on July 11. * Death Cab for Cutie will perform on July 18. * CAAMP will perform on July 21. * Alison Krauss & Union Station will perform on July 25. * Ella Langley will perform on July 31. * Luke Bryan will perform his "Word On The Street Tour" on Aug. 26.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於葛萊美獎得主Zach Top加入CMAC 2026年演唱會陣容，並列出其他表演者，內容中並未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Yung Kai Sails Into Toronto, Florence + The Machine Screams for Montreal: Canadian Concerts of the Week - Billboard Canada
recentArticles.snippet: # Yung Kai Sails Into Toronto, Florence + The Machine Screams for Montreal: Canadian Concerts of the Week. Also this week, Vancouver indie rock band Said The Whale plays a hometown gig to celebrate their 20th anniversary and rising Toronto-born pop singer Tiffany Day celebrates her sophomore record with an album release show in Toronto. Then, U.K. singer RAYE heads to Laval and Toronto, in support of her latest album, **This Music May Contain Hope** and Florence + The Machine creeps into Montreal and Toronto to play songs from their latest record, **Everybody Scream**. Last month, the U.K. singer-songwriter released her second record, **This Music May Contain Hope**, debuting at No. 10 on the Billboard Canadian Albums chart. ## Yung Kai Sails Into Toronto, Florence + The Machine Screams for Montreal: Canadian Concerts of the Week. After months of teasing the track live, the Canadian electronic hitmaker and the British singer’s first-ever collaboration has debuted at No. 39 on the Billboard Canada CHR/Top 40 Airplay chart, dated April 11.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導主要關於加拿大地區的演唱會及新歌發布，內容並未提及周杰倫。

recentArticles.title: Zion’s EP ‘The Perfect Melody II’ & More Best New Music Latin - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Zion’s EP ‘The Perfect Melody II’ & More Best New Music Latin. Plus, check out *Billboard*'s New Music Latin weekly playlist below! Colombia’s *vieja escuela* (old school) Andy Rivera joins forces with Juan Duque and ONIKX of *la nueva escuela* (new school) for the release of “Amar y Ya.” On the nearly three-minute track, produced by Sherman and FINE, the three artists sing about a love that’s pure and honest, declaring in the chorus: “After you, there is nothing/ With you, I lack nothing/ I feel like I have everything/ After you, there is nothing/ I want everything with you—don’t leave me longing.” Backed by an urban-tinged, suave Afrobeats rhythm, “Amar y Ya,” which translates to “love and that’s all,” combines the sweet melodious vocals of Rivera, Duque and ONIKX, giving the song that extra romantic touch.
recentArticles.summary: Zion’s EP ‘The Perfect Melody II’ & More Best New Music Latin - Billboard
